homepage.headline: Your AI Work OS.
homepage.subheadline: Describe what you are working on. TWOS turns it into a workspace, forms an AI model team, and asks before using tools.
homepage.trustLine: You approve every tool action before it runs.
homepage.modelLine: Models may include ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Grok, and more.
homepage.composerHelper: Input an idea, project, task, sync, recap, or result.

zeroState.title: No workspace yet.
zeroState.text: Create your first workspace by describing the work.

homepage.productLoop: Input → AI Board → Workspace → Approved Tools → Review
homepage.loopSupport: TWOS keeps the plan, handoff, validation, and guardrails together.
homepage.aiBoardShort: An AI Board is generated for each task. Roles and models are editable before tools run.
